response.overview: Erica has never liked Luz. Both are queer Latinas competing for the same jobs in Hollywood, and Luz always wins. Invited to ‘catch-up’ at Luz’s luxurious home, Erica expects the usual show-off session; but after plenty of wine, their defenses come crashing down. Just as Erica opens up and confesses her frustration with her sputtering career, Luz reveals her true secret: she sold her soul to the devil to succeed, and tonight’s invitation has a very deadly purpose.
response.title: I Don't Hate Her
